globalNews.title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
globalNews.summary: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.

globalNews.title: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
globalNews.summary: The EU's top court finds that the reforms breached EU values on a number of levels and broke the founding values of the EU treaty.

globalNews.title: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
globalNews.summary: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.

globalNews.title: Nigeria charges six people with treason over Independence Day coup plot
globalNews.summary: Allegations of a coup plot first surfaced in October 2025 when an Independence Day parade was cancelled.

globalNews.title: Role of US officials killed in crash in Mexico under scrutiny
globalNews.summary: The two died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a clandestine drug lab.

cryptoNews.title: UK plans payments rule changes for stablecoins, tokenized deposits
cryptoNews.summary: The UK government plans a stablecoin and tokenization rules overhaul, appointing former FCA official Chris Woolard to support work on its digital markets strategy.

cryptoNews.title: South Korea tax agency opens bidding for crypto tracing tool
cryptoNews.summary: South Korea's tax authority is looking to build crypto transaction tracking software that can help track potential tax evaders.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto hackers stole $17B over past 10 years: DefiLlama
cryptoNews.summary: Private key compromises led crypto hack losses over the past decade as recent DeFi exploits show attackers moving beyond smart contract bugs.

cryptoNews.title: Canton, ZKsync clash over how blockchains enforce rules
cryptoNews.summary: Matter Labs’ Alex Gluchowski says Canton isn’t a blockchain, while Digital Asset co-founders argue public chains aren’t that different.

cryptoNews.title: XRP holders back in profit as price eyes potential 55% breakout
cryptoNews.summary: Most XRP investors are back in profit, increasing the chance for a rally to $2.24, but bulls must first hold the price above $1.40.

aiNews.title: GRAI believes AI can make music more social, not replace artists
aiNews.summary: AI music startup GRAI says fans want to remix tracks, not generate songs from scratch.

aiNews.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
aiNews.summary: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

aiNews.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in APAC countries

aiNews.title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
aiNews.summary: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.
